items.question_zh: 每一步是否都有可读的反馈（不仅最终结果）？
items.question_en: Does every step emit readable feedback, not just a final result?

items.question_zh: 是否检查 diff 而不仅是绿色检查（防 harness 认证错误代码）？
items.question_en: Is the diff inspected, not just the green check (anti harness-certifying-wrong-code)?

items.question_zh: 是否监控测试被删除/弱化、断言被降级（奖励作弊信号）？
items.question_en: Is deletion/weakening of tests and downgraded assertions monitored (reward-hack signals)?

items.question_zh: 是否监控上下文窗口占用，逼近上限时触发压缩/外部记忆？
items.question_en: Is context-window utilization watched, triggering compaction/external memory near the ceiling?

items.question_zh: 是否记录成功率与其完整性对照指标（成功率+奖励作弊率）？
items.question_en: Are success metrics tracked alongside their integrity counterweights (success + reward-hack rate)?

items.question_zh: 循环停止时是否产出可审计总结（根因、改动、检查、剩余风险）？
items.question_en: On stop, does it produce an auditable summary (root cause, changes, checks, residual risk)?

items.question_zh: 对已上线改动，生产遥测是否回流以发现建模与真实执行的偏差？
items.question_en: For shipped changes, does production telemetry feed back to surface model-vs-reality mismatches?
